title: stelis patens
intro: Stelis patens, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Stelis patens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
